summary: Iteration 8: Frontend-only testing of new TokenCalculatorSummary component. All 8 requested features verified working correctly. The component displays at top of Sizing tab and correctly syncs with Quick Capture bar data.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <button> cannot be a descendant of <button>' - nested button in AccordionTrigger with Switch component. This is a React hydration warning but doesn't affect functionality. (Pre-existing issue from iteration 7)

passed_tests: TokenCalculatorSummary displays at top of Sizing tab
Summary cards - Total Sites (4), Total IPs (75,000), Total Tokens (3,520), Partner SKU (IB-TOKENS-SECURITY-5K)
Site Sizing Recommendations table - shows all sites with roles, platforms, models, hardware SKUs, and tokens
Bill of Materials (BOM) - aggregates hardware SKUs with quantities (TE-906-HW-2AC: Qty 4)
Token Breakdown - shows Infrastructure (3,520), Security (0), UDDI (0) tokens
Partner SKU recommendation - correctly calculates IB-TOKENS-SECURITY-5K for 3,520 tokens
Site data sync - Summary reads from Quick Capture bar data (DCs and Sites)
Role display - GM (green badge), GMC (gray badge), DNS/DHCP (outline badge) render correctly
IP calculation - KW × multiplier (10,000 × 2.5 = 25,000 IPs per DC)
No Sites Configured message - displays correctly when no sites exist
Dynamic updates - Adding new DC/Site via Quick Capture updates summary in real-time
Total row in table - correctly sums IPs, KW, and Tokens
Assigned Sites in BOM - shows site names with '+N more' for overflow
Recommended Partner SKU section - displays prominently with badge
data-testid attributes - token-calculator-summary, summary-site-*, bom-item-* present
critical_code_review_comments: TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx is well-structured with proper memoization using useMemo
Component correctly handles empty state with 'No Sites Configured' message
Partner SKU calculation logic is correct (5K, 10K, 17K, 25K, 50K, 100K+ tiers)
Hardware SKU descriptions are properly mapped in getSkuDescription helper
seed_data_creation: Used existing test customer 'Test Customer for Discovery' with 2 DCs (Main DC: KW 10,000, DR DC: KW 10,000) and 2 Sites (Branch 1: KW 5,000, Branch 2: KW 5,000). Total: 30,000 KW = 75,000 IPs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: TokenCalculatorSummary component fully tested and working. Key features: 1) Summary cards at top (Total Sites, Total IPs, Total Tokens, Partner SKU), 2) Site Sizing Recommendations table with role badges (GM/GMC/DNS/DHCP), 3) Bill of Materials aggregating hardware SKUs, 4) Token Breakdown showing Infrastructure/Security/UDDI tokens, 5) Partner SKU recommendation based on total tokens. Component reads from DiscoveryContext (dataCenters, sites, answers) and calculates totals using calculations.js functions.

site_sizing_table.total_row: Shows sum of IPs, KW, and Tokens

bill_of_materials.aggregation: Groups by SKU with quantity count

data_sync.real_time_updates: Yes - adding DC/Site updates summary immediately
